A-DGN.description: Legacy benchmark fixture key retained for gt-code compatibility. The task semantics are Qlib A-share temporal prediction-score modeling over daily per-instrument features.

variables.\\hat{y}_{t,i}: Qlib prediction signal score for instrument i at datetime t, trained against LABEL0 and saved to the pred.pkl score column.
variables.X_{t-L+1:t,i}: Daily point-in-time feature window for instrument i ending at datetime t.
variables.f_{\\theta}: Tabular or TimeSeries model allowed by the Qlib A-share model output boundary.
